tools.name: hash
tools.description: Compute a cryptographic hash (SHA-1/SHA-256/SHA-384/SHA-512) of the input. LLMs cannot compute hashes — always use this tool. Returns hex and base64 digests.

tools.name: encode
tools.description: Encode UTF-8 text to base64, base64url, hex, or URL (percent) encoding. Exact, unlike LLM in-context encoding.

tools.name: decode
tools.description: Decode base64, base64url, hex, or URL (percent) encoded data. Returns UTF-8 text when the bytes are valid UTF-8, plus the raw bytes as hex.

tools.name: jwt_decode
tools.description: Decode a JWT's header and payload WITHOUT verifying the signature. Expands exp/iat/nbf to ISO timestamps and reports expiry. Never treat the result as authenticated.

tools.name: generate_uuid
tools.description: Generate RFC 4122 UUIDs: random v4, or deterministic v5 from a namespace UUID and a name. LLMs cannot generate valid random or v5 UUIDs — use this tool.
